sections.content:
Hi {{{Recipient.FirstName}}},

Sales programs teams are the hidden champions behind the success of any sales operation, serving as the vital lever that sales leaders pull to close their revenue gaps.

The question that looms: where do these Sales Programs reside, and are they being executed to drive results?

That’s why we’ve developed Sales Programs, a solution that delivers the programs you’re already running directly in Salesforce, and ties them automatically to revenue results.

Customers are using Sales Programs to run:
  • Cross-sells and up-sells plays
  • Pipe gen and pipe maturation programs
  • Competitor plays
  • New product introduction programs
  • Lead follow ups
If you’re running one of these plays now, and want to do it from inside of Salesforce, we should chat.

Talk soon,
SP AE
